posts.title: 2020 SaaS Survey Results- COVID Edition!
posts.summary: KBCM TECHNOLOGY GROUP SAAS SURVEY – COVID EDITION For the eighth year in a row, we’re proud to work with KBCM Technology Group (formerly Pacific Crest Securities) Thank you to the readers of forEntrepreneurs who participated in taking the survey! … The post 2020 SaaS Survey Results- COVID Edition! appeared first on For Entrepreneurs .
